title: Build order respects dependencies
description: A project owner or AI tool computes a build order that honours the dependency graph declared on FBS items, surfaces parallel-safe items, and detects cycles.
iWant: the build order to respect the dependency graph declared on the FBS items
soThat: no slice is built before the work it depends on

acceptanceCriteria.description: The computed order is a valid topological order in which dependencies precede dependents
acceptanceCriteria.given: a set of FBS items with declared dependencies
acceptanceCriteria.then: it is a valid ordering in which every dependency precedes the items that depend on it

acceptanceCriteria.description: FBS items with no dependency between them are reported as parallel-safe
acceptanceCriteria.given: FBS items with no dependency between them

acceptanceCriteria.description: A dependency cycle is detected and reported rather than producing a partial order
acceptanceCriteria.then: the cycle is detected and reported rather than producing a partial order
